  Workflows orchestrate one or more functions into a directed acyclic graph (DAG) for document processing.
  Use these endpoints to create, update, list, and manage workflows, and to invoke them

# bem_workflows (Data Source)

Workflows orchestrate one or more functions into a directed acyclic graph (DAG) for document processing.

Use these endpoints to create, update, list, and manage workflows, and to invoke them
with file input via `POST /v3/workflows/{workflowName}/call`.

The call endpoint accepts files as either multipart form data or JSON with base64-encoded
content. In the Bem CLI, use `@path/to/file` inside JSON values to automatically read and
encode files:

```
bem workflows call --workflow-name my-workflow \
  --input.single-file '{"inputContent": "@file.pdf", "inputType": "pdf"}' \
  --wait
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "bem_workflows" "example_workflows" {
  display_name = "displayName"
  function_ids = ["string"]
  function_names = ["string"]
  tags = ["string"]
  workflow_ids = ["string"]
  workflow_names = ["string"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `display_name` (String)
- `function_ids` (List of String)
- `function_names` (List of String)
- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000
- `sort_order` (String) Available values: "asc", "desc".
- `tags` (List of String)
- `workflow_ids` (List of String)
- `workflow_names` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `audit` (Attributes) Audit trail information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--audit))
- `connectors` (Attributes List) Connectors currently attached to this workflow. For version-scoped reads
(`/versions/{n}`) this is always empty — connectors are current-state and
not part of version history. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--connectors))
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the workflow was created.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `edges` (Attributes List) All directed edges in this workflow version's DAG. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--edges))
- `email_address` (String) Inbound email address associated with the workflow, if any.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the workflow.
- `main_node_name` (String) Name of the entry-point call-site node.
- `name` (String) Unique name of the workflow within the environment.
- `nodes` (Attributes List) All call-site nodes in this workflow version's DAG. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--nodes))
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the workflow.
- `updated_at` (String) The date and time the workflow was last updated.
- `version_num` (Number) Version number of this workflow version.

<a id="nestedatt--items--audit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.audit`

Read-Only:

- `version_created_by` (Attributes) Information about who created the current version. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--audit--version_created_by))
- `workflow_created_by` (Attributes) Information about who created the workflow. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--audit--workflow_created_by))
- `workflow_last_updated_by` (Attributes) Information about who last updated the workflow. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--audit--workflow_last_updated_by))

<a id="nestedatt--items--audit--version_created_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.audit.version_created_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.


<a id="nestedatt--items--audit--workflow_created_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.audit.workflow_created_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.


<a id="nestedatt--items--audit--workflow_last_updated_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.audit.workflow_last_updated_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.



<a id="nestedatt--items--connectors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.connectors`

Read-Only:

- `connector_id` (String) Unique connector API ID.
- `name` (String) Human-friendly connector name.
- `paragon` (Attributes) Paragon-integration configuration on a workflow connector. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--connectors--paragon))
- `type` (String) Discriminator for a workflow connector. V3 supports `paragon` only.
Available values: "paragon".

<a id="nestedatt--items--connectors--paragon"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.connectors.paragon`

Read-Only:

- `configuration` (String) Opaque per-integration configuration (e.g. `{"folderId": "..."}`).
- `integration` (String) Paragon integration key (e.g. "googledrive").
- `sync_id` (String) Paragon sync ID managed by the server. Read-only.



<a id="nestedatt--items--edges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.edges`

Read-Only:

- `destination_name` (String) Labelled outlet on the source node, if any.
- `destination_node_name` (String) Name of the destination node.
- `metadata` (String) Opaque free-form JSON object attached to this edge on create/update.
Returned verbatim; never interpreted by the server.
- `source_node_name` (String) Name of the source node.


<a id="nestedatt--items--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.nodes`

Read-Only:

- `function` (Attributes) Function (and version) executing at this call site. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--nodes--function))
- `metadata` (String) Opaque free-form JSON object attached to this node on create/update.
Returned verbatim; never interpreted by the server.
- `name` (String) Name of this call site, unique within the workflow version.

<a id="nestedatt--items--nodes--function"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.nodes.function`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of function. Provide either id or name, not both.
- `name` (String) Name of function. Must be UNIQUE on a per-environment basis. Provide either id or name, not both.
- `version_num` (Number) Version number of function.
